name: Lead-210 Sediment Core Data from LTp22-1
description: Dataset containing sediment depth measurements, Lead-210 (210Pb) activity, and associated uncertainties from a sediment core sample (LTp22-1) collected at 21.277661°N, -104.690167°E on 2022-04-08. Includes supported and unsupported 210Pb measurements with standard deviations.
